description: Fix null pointer error when processing empty patient records
goal: Add null check to prevent <OBJECT REFERENCE> error when Patient object is null
expected_behavior: GetPatientName should check if patient object is null before accessing properties. Return empty string or handle error gracefully.
hints: Use '$IsObject(patient) to check if patient is null
Return empty string or appropriate error value when patient not found

metadata.source: Typical null pointer bug pattern in IRIS applications
metadata.author: objectscript-coder
metadata.jira_reference: Inspired by common patient record access bugs
